content-right-description1:
Overview

A block placed on a space station, allows the player to travel to analyzed celestrial bodies (warp requires distance data).
content-right-description2:
Usage

Input your galaxy database, which has the target planets distance data, click 'open galaxy', select the target planet, press 'escape' and click travel.
You can clear the target planet by clicking 'clear'.

The distance to the planet will be displayed in AU (Astronomical Units) in the bottom left.
Your current orbiting planet will be displayed on the left and your target orbit on the right.

When traveling at fast speed there will be a warp buble created, on extremly fast speeds (mostly when traveling between stars) the blue will become intense and light particels will be stretched.
